pi_items.source: task.json and verifier.py explicit checks for OC_PRESTATION_CODE
task.json instructions and verifier.py price logic (abs(price - 15.00) < 0.1)
task.json instructions, setup_task.sh setup vars, and verifier.py querying OC_DEBET_PATIENTID=10004
Inspected config/seed_data.sql which is used by setup_task.sh to populate patient data. Patient 10004 is statically defined as David Okonkwo, and no script updates this to Darwin Charles.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated OpenClinic GA patient data. The agent is required to create a new service code 'TELE01' for 15.00 and invoice patient ID 10004. While the task instructions explicitly tell the agent to look for 'Darwin Charles' as patient 10004, the underlying MySQL seed data (config/seed_data.sql) actually defines patient 10004 as 'David Okonkwo'. The agent will encounter this discrepancy.
